_comment: Mutation testing scoped to pure-logic files where surviving mutants reliably indicate weak tests or real bugs. Uses the command runner because there is no Stryker-Bun runner. Each mutant kills bun-test scoped to the matching test files (example + property), so killing time is bounded per mutant.

commandRunner.command: bun test src/shared/lib/errors.test.ts src/shared/api/settings-codec.test.ts src/shared/lib/openrouter-model-selection.test.ts src/shared/lib/ollama-endpoint.test.ts src/widgets/openrouter-model-selector/lib/model-exclusion.test.ts src/shared/lib/cn.test.ts src/shared/lib/fuzzy-match.test.ts src/shared/lib/format-time.test.ts src/shared/lib/format-bytes.test.ts src/shared/lib/generate-id.test.ts src/features/audio-visualizer/lib/hex-to-rgb.test.ts src/features/text-post-processing/lib/apply-replacements.test.ts src/entities/transcription/lib/speaker-color.test.ts src/entities/audio-device/lib/device-options.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/quantization-helpers.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/family-helpers.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/variant-helpers.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/realtime-viability.test.ts src/shared/lib/realtime-enabled.test.ts src/shared/lib/errors.property.test.ts src/shared/api/settings-codec.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/openrouter-model-selection.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/ollama-endpoint.property.test.ts src/widgets/openrouter-model-selector/lib/model-exclusion.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/cn.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/fuzzy-match.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/format-time.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/format-bytes.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/generate-id.property.test.ts src/features/audio-visualizer/lib/hex-to-rgb.property.test.ts src/features/text-post-processing/lib/apply-replacements.property.test.ts src/entities/transcription/lib/speaker-color.property.test.ts src/entities/audio-device/lib/device-options.property.test.ts src/shared/lib/realtime-enabled.property.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/quantization-helpers.property.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/family-helpers.property.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/variant-helpers.property.test.ts src/widgets/stt-model-selector/lib/realtime-viability.property.test.ts
